prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-CERAMIC-WHT-10PK-18MM-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 10-Pack Snap-off 18mm Utility Knife Ceramic Razor Blades, Ultra Sharp Craft Supplies Description: Outperforming steel utility blades and unquestionably sharper, these 18mm replacement razor blades from ToolTreaux will likely have you making the permanent jump to ceramic.

Compared to traditional metal blades, ToolTreaux's ceramic box cutter blades will outperform standard steel blades, especially in a warehouse or commercial setting; that being said, they are absolutely suitable for at home, office or studio use for DIY projects or arts and crafts too. Regardless of place or project, this is what matters: these ceramic replacement utility blades will afford you a longer, more reliable and uninterrupted work flow across many different projects, saving you time, money and effort.

What makes these replacement blades so unique? Their ceramic zirconia fabrication. Durable, strong and always reliable, the blades ceramic zirconia construction allows for long periods of incredible sharpness, non dulling superior edge retention, and will easily slice through foam, paper, fabric, rubber and more with speed, accuracy and precision. Notably, the box cutter blades are rust resistant, nonmagnetic, nonmetallic and non porous too, meaning not a lot is going to affect their performance or structural longevity.

In this package you'll receive 10 replacement ceramic razor blades, secured in a handy plastic storage container to keep blades safe when not in use. These wear resistant, 18mm replacement ceramic razor blades are compatible with most standard utility knives or box cutter knives.

Very sharp, use with caution.

Sold as pack of 10 individual blades. Search Terms: art supplies scrapbooking supplies arts and crafts hobby knife blades utility knife fabric cutter sewing upholstery tools box cutter school supplies craft kits leather working tools precision knife craft knife razor blades Features: - OUTPERFORM METAL BLADES: ToolTreaux's ceramic zirconia replacement utility knife blades will outperform standard steel or other metal blades, even in a warehouse or commercial setting; the ceramic box cutter blades will afford you a longer, more reliable and uninterrupted work flow across many different work or DIY projects - LONG LASTING BOX CUTTER BLADES: Durable and strong, ceramic zirconia construction allows for long periods of incredible sharpness, superior edge retention and will easily slice through foam, paper, fabric, rubber and more with speed, accuracy and precision - CERAMIC ZIRCONIA REPLACEMENT BLADES: In this package you'll receive 10 replacement utility knife ceramic razor blades; the razor blades are non dulling, rust resistant, nonmagnetic, nonmetallic and non porous, and come in a handy plastic storage case to keep unused blades secure - UTILITY KNIFE COMPATIBILITY: These ceramic utility knife replacement blades measure 2 inches wide x 0.75 inch in length and are compatible with most standard utility knives and box cutters - SPECIFICATIONS: Case Dimensions: 5 x 1 x 0.5 inches; 10 Pack Weight: 0.15lbs; Color: White; Material: Ceramic Zirconia; Blade Weight: 0.01lbs; Blade Dimensions: 4 x 0.75 x 0.06 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 10-pk 18mm White Ceramic Utility Knife Blades

anthropic.title_differentiation: Ceramic Zirconia, Outperforms Steel, Non-Dulling, Rust Resistant, Compatible Standard Utility Knives

openai.title_differentiation: Ceramic Zirconia, Rust Resistant, Nonmagnetic, Long Lasting Sharpness, Cuts Foam Paper Fabric Rubber, Storage Case
